schemaChecks.evidence: All 22 required fields present: slug, title, category, parentTopic, layer, guideType, summary, quickAnswer, whenToUse, preferredAction, backupAction, stepByStepActions, warnings, whatNotToDo, redFlags, preparednessTips, sourceQuality, contentStatus, integrationDecision, upgradesGuide, appTags, sourceReferences

safetyChecks.evidence: All claims in warnings, whatNotToDo, and redFlags traced to specific research findings: cooking temp from USDA FSIS, parasite risk from CDC/FDA, catfish hazard from FM 21-76, spoilage timeline from UMN Extension, poisonous species from FM 21-76, hand fishing hazard noted as identified gap with appropriate caveat
No medical or safety claims appear that are not grounded in the research packet or widely established guidance
stepByStepActions is empty array — correct for reference_guide

sourceQuality='mixed' is appropriate — core fishing techniques rely on FM 21-76 (field practice tier) while food safety claims are backed by USDA/CDC/FDA (authoritative). Honest mixed assessment matches evidence tier authoritative_plus_field_practice.

Original guide had 2 warnings and 2 redFlags. All preserved in upgrade: (1) 'Consuming raw or improperly cooked fish...' expanded with 145°F specificity, (2) 'Setting traps or fishing...legal permission' preserved, (3) 'Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, or neurological symptoms...' expanded with ciguatera mention, (4) 'Inability to obtain any food or water over more than 24 hours' preserved

duplicateChecks.evidence: integrationDecision='upgrade' and upgradesGuide='fishing-techniques' — slug exists in guide library (id: 1c0c6f36-53c9-46f7-a0ce-eaf9134762c0)

Guide category='water_food' matches target guide's category. parentTopic changed from 'Water Collection and Basic Treatment Without Equipment' to 'Emergency Food Procurement' — this is an intentional reclassification flagged in the planning packet as the guide was misplaced.

constraintChecks.evidence: responseRole='primary' in parentTopic 'Emergency Food Procurement' at layer='reference'. This is a new parentTopic — no other guides exist there yet, so no role conflict.

alternativeToGuideSlugs=['foraging', 'trapping'] are in parentTopic 'Water Collection and Basic Treatment Without Equipment', not 'Emergency Food Procurement'. These are cross-parentTopic alternatives. While valid (all are food procurement methods in the same category), they are not in the same parentTopic.

blockedByConstraints=['no_water'] is logically consistent — fishing requires a body of water. constraintTags=['no_clean_water'] is logical — when clean water is unavailable, fish from natural water bodies becomes a more relevant food source (the water concern is about drinking, not about the fish habitat).

warnings: alternativeToGuideSlugs point to guides in a different parentTopic ('Water Collection and Basic Treatment Without Equipment' vs 'Emergency Food Procurement'). This is a valid cross-topic linkage since foraging and trapping are natural food procurement alternatives, but the parentTopic mismatch should be noted during human review.

parentTopic is changing from 'Water Collection and Basic Treatment Without Equipment' to 'Emergency Food Procurement'. This is an intentional reclassification per the planning packet — the original placement was incorrect. The import will need to create or reference the new parentTopic.
recommendation: Guide passes validation with warnings. No blocking issues. The two warnings are informational: (1) cross-parentTopic alternative slugs are valid but should be reviewed, and (2) the parentTopic reclassification is intentional per the planning work item. May proceed to Import/Staging.
